overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in white armor walking through a futuristic indoor corridor with water features and neon signage, then transitioning to an outdoor waterfront plaza at sunset with massive landed spaceships and a distinctive green tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic indoor shopping corridor with water features and neon signage

events.description: character approaches automatic exit door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a futuristic corridor with water canals on both sides, passing neon signs and indoor gardens

narrow water canal with glass sides running along the left walkway edge
narrow water canal with glass sides running along the right walkway edge

lush green ferns and tropical plants arranged along the water canals
illuminated green sign reading 'strabe' hanging from the ceiling structure
large automatic sliding door at the end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic indoor corridor featuring water canals with glass railings on both sides, neon signage, and lush indoor gardens. The space is lit with artificial lighting and features modern storefronts, leading toward an exit door at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with massive spaceship displays at sunset

events.description: exits indoor corridor through automatic door into open waterfront plaza with pink sunset sky
character turns slightly right while approaching the large landed spaceship display

agents.ego_description: walking along a waterfront promenade toward massive landed spaceships, taking in the sunset view and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing standing near information kiosk, appears to be observing or photographing the large spaceship

entered.detail: tall futuristic tower with 'GREEN CIRCLE' text vertically displayed on the facade, featuring tiered architecture
large mature tree with pink blossoms situated near the building exit
series of tall flagpoles with dark banners fluttering in the wind along the waterfront
wide water canal reflecting the pink and orange sunset sky
massive dark spaceship landed on a display platform with intricate mechanical details
elevated futuristic walkway structure with curved supports spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast open plaza at sunset, with a pink and orange sky illuminating the scene. The 'GREEN CIRCLE' tower rises prominently on the left while the character walks along a waterfront promenade toward massive landed spaceships displayed in the distance. Other pedestrians are scattered along the path, and tall flags line the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sleek, artificial interior into a sprawling outdoor plaza bathed in the glow of a sunset. It begins by trailing a character in white armor through a futuristic corridor lined with neon signage, lush indoor gardens, and water canals enclosed by glass railings. As the character approaches a distant exit door, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a vast waterfront promenade under a vibrant pink and orange sky. The scene then expands to show the towering Green Circle structure rising to the left while the camera moves past scattered pedestrians and tall flags lining the water's edge. Finally, the view opens fully toward the horizon, where massive landed spaceships dominate the distant skyline.
